footer.copyright: © 2076 liberiamo.holo // all rights to the authors
footer.descrizione: An independent platform for those who write and those who truly read. No screaming algorithms. Just books, stories, essays, articles — suspended in glass, kept alive by those who choose them.

home.heroDesc: A library suspended in glass. Books, stories, essays and articles published directly by the authors, with no screaming algorithms. Only <keyword>parole_vive</keyword>.
home.evidenzaDesc: A novel, a story, an essay, a poem. Digital pixels and ink, but with teeth.
home.r01d: The writer decides what to publish, what to make downloadable, what to keep protected. Always.
home.r02d: Reviews, chapter-by-chapter comments, the ability to follow who moves you. The community is the backbone.
home.r03d: Transparent filters: most read, most recent, by genre. You choose what to read — not an AI doing it for you.
home.cestinoDesc: Rejected, forgotten, abandoned stories. They rest in the dark, waiting for a verdict. Five readers are enough to bring them back into the catalogue, with the permanent badge "Rescued by readers". You could be one of them.
home.autoreDesc: Publish directly: books, stories, essays or articles. Keep your rights, choose what's downloadable, receive donations from readers who follow you.
home.lettoreDesc: Free access to all public content. Comment, follow authors, download within the set limits, support those you love with a free donation.
home.taglineCassetto: Let them out of the drawer,
home.taglineCassettoSub: the books that never saw the light.

langSwitch.modal_desc: Your language is not yet available. Request it and we'll write to you to confirm availability as soon as possible.
langSwitch.success: Request received! You'll get a confirmation email soon.

catalogo.desc: Real-time holographic index. Search, filter, choose. No algorithms deciding for you.

autoriPage.desc: Alphabetical list of those who have deposited words in this library. Click a name to see their works.

cestino.desc: Forgotten works. Stories waiting for five votes to be rescued from obscurity. Read. Decide. Save.
cestino.vuoto: No lost writings. The Cestino is empty.
cestino.nessunoAutore: No texts in this archive for this author.
cestino.nessunVoto: No texts with this number of votes.

authLogin.pageSubtitle: Three doors. One library. Choose how to enter.
authLogin.opt01Desc: To read and to publish your works.
authLogin.opt02Desc: Already have an account? Identify yourself.
authLogin.opt03Desc: Free access to all public content. No registration.
authLogin.errOspite: Error accessing as guest. Try again.

registrazione.pageSubtitle: Three steps and you're in. Required fields are in cyan.
registrazione.modalDesc: Would you like to set up an author profile?
registrazione.modalSub: You can always do it later.
registrazione.modalSi: Yes, I want to be an author
registrazione.panelAutoreDesc: Set up your author profile: bio, publishing genres, reserved area.

profiloAutore.pageSubtitle: Your holographic business card. What readers will see first.
profiloAutore.bioTitle: Who are you, in a few lines
profiloAutore.bioPlaceholder: A night librarian who writes stories between 2 and 5 in the morning...
profiloAutore.generiDesc: Select at least one genre. You can change them anytime.
profiloAutore.lancioDesc: Save the profile, then enter your reserved area to manage your works.

collana.nessuna: No stories yet in this collection.

libriAperti.desc: Works written in real time. Follow a book as it's born, read chapter by chapter, leave your impressions before the final word.
libriAperti.nessunLibro: No open books at the moment.
libriAperti.copertinaNonDisponibile: Cover not yet chosen by the author
libriAperti.accediPerSeguire: Log in to follow this book
libriAperti.commentaPlaceholder: Write your impression of this chapter...
libriAperti.commentoInAttesa: Comment sent. The author will review it before publishing.
libriAperti.accediPerCommentare: Log in to leave a comment
libriAperti.chiudiLibro: Close book and publish to catalogue
libriAperti.confermaChiudi: Are you sure? The book will move to the catalogue and all subscribed readers will be notified.
libriAperti.titoloCapitoloPlaceholder: e.g. The night of the first day
libriAperti.capitoloPubblicato: Chapter published. Subscribed readers have been notified.
